title: Tax notice triage with specialist routing
description: Route a fictional notice, retrieve source facts, and produce a bounded preparation checklist.
prompt: Summarize a fictional notice and identify missing information.

events.text: Fictional tax workspace loaded · external provider routing disabled in this demo
Summarize this fictional notice, identify the stated issue, and give me a missing-information checklist for professional review.
Coordinator routed the request to Tax Specialist.
Searching the attached notice and matter documents · matter filter applied

events.title: Agency information request — fictional.pdf
events.snippet: The fictional notice requests support for three expense categories and identifies a response date printed on the first page.

events.title: Expense ledger — fictional.csv
events.snippet: Two categories contain memo descriptions but no linked receipts; one travel line lacks a business-purpose field.

events.text: Retrieval complete · 5 chunks reviewed · 2 sources selected

The fictional notice asks for substantiation of three expense categories. The matter ledger shows missing receipt links in two categories and an incomplete business-purpose field for one travel item. Before a professional prepares any response, verify the notice date from the original, obtain the missing receipts, document business purpose, and reconcile the listed totals to the filed return.
This workflow organizes source facts. It does not determine tax liability, predict savings, or replace licensed review.

events.title: Tax notice preparation checklist
events.text: A preparer-oriented missing-information checklist is ready.
Triage complete · move the source-backed checklist to professional review
